tabs.wallets.description: Profile page tab label for the linked-wallets section.

tabs.accounts.description: Profile page tab label for the connected accounts (social/contact) section.

tabs.contactDetails.description: Profile page tab label for the contact-details / registration-info section.

tabs.security.description: Profile page tab label for the security section (API keys, login history).

header.accountIdentifierCopied.description: Toast title shown after copying the account identifier from the profile header.

header.accountIdentifierCopiedDescriptio.description: Toast body confirming the account identifier was copied to the clipboard.

header.accountEmailCopied.description: Toast title shown after copying the account email from the profile header.

header.accountEmailCopiedDescription.description: Toast body confirming the account email was copied to the clipboard.

account.notConnected.description: Status text on an account row indicating no account of this type is linked yet.

wallets.title.description: Section heading for the list of wallets linked to the user's account.

wallets.description.description: Subheading under the Linked Wallets section describing its purpose.

wallets.link.description: Button to link a new wallet.

wallets.empty.description: Empty-state text shown when the user has no linked wallets.

wallets.linkWallet.description: Button/label to link a wallet (full form).

wallets.primary.description: Suffix badge marking the user's primary wallet, shown after its address. Includes the surrounding parentheses.

wallets.copyAddressAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that copies a wallet address.

wallets.viewOnExplorerAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button opening the wallet on a block explorer. Keep the explorer name 'Etherscan' untranslated.

wallets.removeWalletAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that removes/unlinks a wallet.

wallets.primaryCannotUnlink.description: Tooltip/disabled-state message explaining the primary wallet cannot be unlinked.

wallets.addressCopied.description: Toast title shown after copying a wallet address.

wallets.addressCopiedDescription.description: Toast body confirming the wallet address was copied to the clipboard.

wallets.impersonateLinkAlert.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to link a wallet (not allowed).

wallets.impersonateUnlinkAlert.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to unlink a wallet (not allowed).

wallets.unlinkSuccess.description: Toast title shown after a wallet is successfully unlinked.

wallets.unlinkSuccessDescription.description: Toast body confirming the wallet was successfully unlinked.

wallets.unlinkFailure.description: Toast title shown when unlinking a wallet fails.

wallets.unlinkDialogTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog for unlinking a wallet.

wallets.unlinkDialogDescription.description: Confirmation-dialog body asking the user to confirm unlinking. {address} is the wallet address — keep untranslated.

wallets.unlinking.description: Button label shown while the wallet is being unlinked (in-progress state).

wallets.unlink.description: Confirm button to unlink the wallet in the confirmation dialog.

socialAccounts.title.description: Section heading for linking social media accounts.

socialAccounts.description.description: Subheading under the Social Accounts section describing its purpose.

socialAccounts.twitterTitle.description: Row label for the Twitter account. Brand name — keep 'Twitter' untranslated.

socialAccounts.githubTitle.description: Row label for the GitHub account. Brand name — keep 'GitHub' untranslated.

socialAccounts.impersonateLinkGithubAler.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to link a GitHub account (not allowed). Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.impersonateUnlinkGithubAl.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to unlink a GitHub account (not allowed). Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.impersonateLinkTwitterAle.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to link a Twitter account (not allowed). Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.impersonateUnlinkTwitterA.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to unlink a Twitter account (not allowed). Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.linkGithubFailure.description: Toast title shown when linking a GitHub account fails. Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.unlinkGithubSuccess.description: Toast title shown after a GitHub account is unlinked. Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.unlinkGithubSuccessDescri.description: Toast body confirming the GitHub account was successfully unlinked.

socialAccounts.unlinkGithubFailure.description: Toast title shown when unlinking a GitHub account fails. Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.linkTwitterFailure.description: Toast title shown when linking a Twitter account fails. Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.unlinkTwitterSuccess.description: Toast title shown after a Twitter account is unlinked. Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.unlinkTwitterSuccessDescr.description: Toast body confirming the Twitter account was successfully unlinked.

socialAccounts.unlinkTwitterFailure.description: Toast title shown when unlinking a Twitter account fails. Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.tryAgain.description: Toast body inviting a retry after a social-account action fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

socialAccounts.unlinkGithubDialogTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog for unlinking a GitHub account. Keep 'GitHub'.

socialAccounts.unlinkTwitterDialogTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog for unlinking a Twitter account. Keep 'Twitter'.

socialAccounts.confirmUnlink.description: Confirmation-dialog body asking the user to confirm unlinking a social account.

socialAccounts.unlink.description: Confirm button to unlink the social account in the confirmation dialog.

contactAccounts.emailTitle.description: Row label for the linked email address contact method.

contactAccounts.phoneTitle.description: Row label for the linked phone number contact method.

contactAccounts.impersonateLinkEmailAler.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to link an email address (not allowed).

contactAccounts.impersonateUnlinkEmailAl.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to unlink an email address (not allowed).

contactAccounts.impersonateUnlinkPhoneAl.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to unlink a phone number (not allowed).

contactAccounts.impersonateLinkPhoneAler.description: Alert shown when an admin impersonating a user tries to link a phone number (not allowed).

contactAccounts.linkEmailFailure.description: Toast title shown when linking an email address fails.

contactAccounts.unlinkEmailFailure.description: Toast title shown when unlinking an email address fails.

contactAccounts.unlinkPhoneSuccess.description: Toast title shown after a phone number is unlinked.

contactAccounts.unlinkPhoneSuccessDescri.description: Toast body confirming the phone number was successfully unlinked.

contactAccounts.unlinkPhoneFailure.description: Toast title shown when unlinking a phone number fails.

contactAccounts.linkPhoneSuccess.description: Toast title shown after a phone number is linked.

contactAccounts.linkPhoneSuccessDescript.description: Toast body confirming the phone number was successfully linked.

contactAccounts.linkPhoneFailure.description: Toast title shown when linking a phone number fails.

contactAccounts.tryAgain.description: Toast body inviting a retry after a contact-account action fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

contactDetails.title.description: Heading of the Contact Details form (registration / account-management info).

contactDetails.description.description: Subheading under Contact Details explaining the info is used for domain registration and account management.

contactDetails.updateSuccess.description: Toast shown after contact details are saved successfully.

contactDetails.updateFailure.description: Toast shown when saving contact details fails.

contactDetails.unavailable.description: Notice shown when Privy profile details cannot be loaded for the session. Keep the brand name 'Privy' untranslated.

contactDetails.contactMethods.description: Subsection heading grouping the user's contact methods (email/phone) within Contact Details.

contactDetails.profileInformation.description: Subsection heading grouping the profile/name/address fields within Contact Details.

contactDetails.fullName.description: Field label for the user's full name.

contactDetails.fullNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the full-name field. A sample name — may be localized to a culturally typical name.

contactDetails.streetAddress.description: Field label for the street address.

contactDetails.streetAddressPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the street-address field (sample address).

contactDetails.cityPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the city field (sample city).

contactDetails.stateProvince.description: Field label for the state or province.

contactDetails.stateProvincePlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the state/province field (sample state abbreviation).

contactDetails.zipPostalCode.description: Field label for the ZIP or postal code.

contactDetails.zipPostalCodePlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the ZIP/postal-code field (sample code).

contactDetails.countryRegion.description: Field label for the country or region.

contactDetails.countryRegionPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the country/region selector prompting a choice.

contactDetails.saveProfile.description: Button to save the contact-details / profile form.

emailSubscription.emailPreferences.description: Section heading for email subscription preferences.

emailSubscription.newsletterAndUpdates.description: Label for the newsletter-and-product-updates subscription toggle.

emailSubscription.newsletterDescriptionW.description: Helper text under the newsletter toggle when an email is linked, describing what the subscription delivers.

emailSubscription.newsletterDescriptionN.description: Helper text under the newsletter toggle when no email is linked, prompting the user to link one first.

emailSubscription.subscribedTitle.description: Toast title shown after the user subscribes to email updates.

emailSubscription.subscribedDescription.description: Toast body confirming the user is now subscribed to the newsletter and updates.

emailSubscription.unsubscribedTitle.description: Toast title shown after the user unsubscribes from email updates.

emailSubscription.unsubscribedDescriptio.description: Toast body confirming the user was removed from the mailing list.

emailSubscription.updateFailure.description: Toast title shown when updating email preferences fails.

emailSubscription.tryAgain.description: Toast body inviting a retry after an email-preferences update fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

apiKeys.title.description: Section heading for the user's API keys list (in the Security area).

apiKeys.description.description: Subheading under API Keys describing their purpose (programmatic access).

apiKeys.create.description: Button to start creating a new API key.

apiKeys.empty.description: Empty-state text shown when the user has no API keys.

apiKeys.createApiKey.description: Button/label to create an API key (full form).

apiKeys.badgePlain.description: Badge on an API key row indicating it is a plain (random secret) key type.

apiKeys.badgePublicPrivate.description: Badge on an API key row indicating it is a public/private key-pair type.

apiKeys.statusRevoked.description: Status badge: the API key has been revoked.

apiKeys.statusExpired.description: Status badge: the API key has expired.

apiKeys.statusActive.description: Status badge: the API key is active.

apiKeys.keyPrefixCopied.description: Toast title shown after copying an API key prefix.

apiKeys.keyPrefixCopiedDescription.description: Toast body confirming the API key prefix was copied to the clipboard.

apiKeys.createdAgo.description: Metadata line on an API key row showing when it was created. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. '3 days ago'.

apiKeys.lastUsedAgo.description: Metadata line showing when the API key was last used. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. '2 hours ago'.

apiKeys.expiresAgo.description: Metadata line showing when the API key will expire. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. 'in 30 days'.

apiKeys.expiredAgo.description: Metadata line showing when the API key expired. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. '5 days ago'.

apiKeys.copyKeyPrefixAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that copies an API key prefix.

apiKeys.copyKeyPrefixTooltip.description: Tooltip for the button that copies an API key prefix.

apiKeys.editRestrictionsAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that edits an API key's restrictions.

apiKeys.editRestrictionsTooltip.description: Tooltip for the button that edits an API key's restrictions.

apiKeys.revokeKeyAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that revokes an API key.

apiKeys.revokeKeyTooltip.description: Tooltip for the button that revokes an API key.

createApiKey.walletActionDescription.description: Phrase appended to a wallet-signature prompt describing the action, e.g. 'Sign … to create the API key'.

createApiKey.title.description: Title of the Create API Key dialog.

createApiKey.description.description: Subtitle of the Create API Key dialog explaining its purpose.

createApiKey.keyName.description: Field label for the API key's name.

createApiKey.keyNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the key-name field, e.g. a name like 'Production API Key'.

createApiKey.keyType.description: Field label for choosing the API key type.

createApiKey.keyTypePlain.description: Option label for the plain (random secret) API key type.

createApiKey.keyTypePublicPrivate.description: Option label for the public/private key-pair API key type.

createApiKey.keyTypeHelpPlain.description: Helper text for the plain key type explaining a random key is generated and must be saved.

createApiKey.keyTypeHelpPublicPrivate.description: Helper text for the key-pair type explaining the user provides a public key and signs requests with the private key.

createApiKey.requestTypes.description: Field label for selecting which request types the key may make.

createApiKey.requestTypesHelp.description: Helper text explaining the user must enable at least one request type.

createApiKey.allowBrowserRequests.description: Checkbox label allowing requests originating from web browsers.

createApiKey.allowBrowserRequestsHelp.description: Helper text describing browser requests as those carrying an Origin header. Keep the technical term 'Origin'.

createApiKey.allowServerRequests.description: Checkbox label allowing requests originating from backend servers.

createApiKey.allowServerRequestsHelp.description: Helper text describing server requests as those without an Origin header. Keep the technical term 'Origin'.

createApiKey.noRequestTypesWarning.description: Warning shown when no request types are enabled, noting the key will reject all requests.

createApiKey.advancedRestrictions.description: Toggle/heading for the advanced IP and Origin restrictions section. Keep 'IP' and 'Origin'.

createApiKey.allowedIps.description: Field label for the allowed IP addresses / CIDR ranges. Keep the technical terms 'IP' and 'CIDR'.

createApiKey.allowedIpsHelp.description: Helper text explaining the allowed-IPs input format (one IP/CIDR per line, IPv4/IPv6, empty allows all). Keep IP/CIDR/IPv4/IPv6.

createApiKey.allowedOrigins.description: Field label for the allowed Origins. Keep the technical term 'Origins'.

createApiKey.allowedOriginsHelp.description: Helper text explaining the allowed-Origins input format (one per line, wildcards, empty allows all). Keep the example 'https://*.example.com' untranslated.

createApiKey.keypair.description: Label for the generated keypair subsection.

createApiKey.generateKeypair.description: Button to generate a new public/private keypair.

createApiKey.savePrivateKeyNow.description: Emphasized warning prompting the user to save their private key immediately.

createApiKey.privateKeyNotStored.description: Warning text explaining the private key is not stored and must be copied and saved.

createApiKey.privateKeyLabel.description: Field label for the generated private key, reminding the user to save it.

createApiKey.publicKey.description: Field label for the public key.

createApiKey.copy.description: Copy button next to a key value.

createApiKey.publicKeyPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example for the public-key input. Keep the literal hex example and the term 'secp256k1' untranslated.

createApiKey.publicKeyHelpGenerated.description: Helper text noting the public key was derived from the generated private key above.

createApiKey.publicKeyHelpManual.description: Helper text instructing how to enter a public key manually. Keep technical details (secp256k1, 65 bytes, 130 hex characters, '04') and the button name 'Generate New Keypair'.

createApiKey.expiration.description: Field label for the API key expiration selector.

createApiKey.expirationNever.description: Expiration option meaning the key never expires.

createApiKey.attestWithSignature.description: Checkbox label to optionally attest the key creation with a wallet signature.

createApiKey.optional.description: Inline '(optional)' marker shown next to a non-required field. Includes the parentheses.

createApiKey.signingWallet.description: Field label for selecting which wallet will sign the request.

createApiKey.active.description: Inline '(active)' marker shown next to the currently active wallet in the signing-wallet selector. Includes the parentheses.

createApiKey.noWalletsConnected.description: Message shown when no wallets are connected, prompting the user to connect one first.

createApiKey.creating.description: Button label shown while the API key is being created (in-progress state).

createApiKey.createKey.description: Confirm button to create the API key.

createApiKey.createdTitle.description: Success-step title shown after the API key is created.

createApiKey.createdDescriptionPlain.description: Success-step body for a plain key, warning the user to copy it now as it won't be shown again.

createApiKey.createdDescriptionKeypair.description: Success-step body for a key pair, reminding the user to have saved their private key.

createApiKey.saveApiKey.description: Heading prompting the user to save their newly created API key.

createApiKey.savePrivateKey.description: Heading prompting the user to save their private key.

createApiKey.saveApiKeyHelp.description: Helper text stressing this is the only time the API key is shown and it must be stored securely.

createApiKey.savePrivateKeyHelp.description: Helper text reminding the user to copy and save the private key needed to sign API requests.

createApiKey.yourApiKey.description: Label above the newly created API key value.

createApiKey.yourPrivateKeyLabel.description: Label above the user's private key value, reminding them to save it.

createApiKey.yourPublicKeyLabel.description: Label above the user's registered public key value.

createApiKey.publicKeyRegisteredHelp.description: Helper text confirming the public key was registered and the private key is used to sign requests.

createApiKey.done.description: Button to close/finish the Create API Key flow.

createApiKey.enterKeyNameError.description: Validation error shown when the API key name field is empty.

createApiKey.enterPublicKeyError.description: Validation error shown when the public key field is empty.

createApiKey.selectWalletError.description: Validation error shown when no signing wallet has been selected.

createApiKey.keypairGenerated.description: Toast shown after a keypair is generated, reminding the user to save the private key.

createApiKey.keypairGenerateFailure.description: Toast shown when keypair generation fails.

createApiKey.privateKeyCopied.description: Toast confirming the private key was copied to the clipboard.

createApiKey.publicKeyCopied.description: Toast confirming the public key was copied to the clipboard.

createApiKey.apiKeyCopied.description: Toast confirming the API key was copied to the clipboard.

createApiKey.createSuccess.description: Toast shown after the API key is created successfully.

createApiKey.signatureRejected.description: Toast shown when the user rejects the wallet signature request.

createApiKey.createFailure.description: Toast shown when API key creation fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

editApiKey.walletActionDescription.description: Phrase appended to a wallet-signature prompt describing the action, e.g. 'Sign … to update the API key'.

editApiKey.title.description: Title of the Edit API Key dialog.

editApiKey.description.description: Subtitle of the Edit API Key dialog. {name} is the API key's name — keep untranslated. Mentions signing the change with a linked wallet.

editApiKey.thisApiKey.description: Fallback phrase used in place of a key name (e.g. when unnamed), substituted into the dialog subtitle.

editApiKey.requestTypes.description: Field label for the request types this key may make (edit dialog).

editApiKey.requestTypesHelp.description: Helper text prompting selection of which request types the key may make (edit dialog).

editApiKey.allowBrowserRequests.description: Checkbox label allowing browser-originated requests (edit dialog).

editApiKey.allowBrowserRequestsHelp.description: Helper text describing browser requests as those with an Origin header (edit dialog). Keep 'Origin'.

editApiKey.allowServerRequests.description: Checkbox label allowing server-originated requests (edit dialog).

editApiKey.allowServerRequestsHelp.description: Helper text describing server requests as those without an Origin header (edit dialog). Keep 'Origin'.

editApiKey.noRequestTypesWarning.description: Warning shown when no request types are enabled (edit dialog), noting the key will reject all requests.

editApiKey.advancedRestrictions.description: Toggle/heading for advanced IP and Origin restrictions (edit dialog). Keep 'IP' and 'Origin'.

editApiKey.allowedIps.description: Field label for allowed IP addresses / CIDR ranges (edit dialog). Keep 'IP' and 'CIDR'.

editApiKey.allowedIpsHelp.description: Helper text for the allowed-IPs input (one IP/CIDR per line, empty allows all). Keep 'IP' and 'CIDR'.

editApiKey.allowedOrigins.description: Field label for allowed Origins (edit dialog). Keep 'Origins'.

editApiKey.allowedOriginsHelp.description: Helper text for the allowed-Origins input (one per line, empty allows all). Keep 'origin'.

editApiKey.signingWallet.description: Field label for selecting which wallet will sign the change (edit dialog).

editApiKey.active.description: Inline '(active)' marker next to the active wallet in the signing-wallet selector. Includes the parentheses.

editApiKey.noWalletsConnected.description: Message shown when no wallets are connected, prompting the user to connect one before saving (edit dialog).

editApiKey.saving.description: Button label shown while changes are being saved (in-progress state).

editApiKey.saveChanges.description: Confirm button to save the edited API key restrictions.

editApiKey.selectWalletError.description: Validation error shown when no signing wallet has been selected (edit dialog).

editApiKey.updateSuccess.description: Toast shown after the API key restrictions are updated.

editApiKey.signatureRejected.description: Toast shown when the user rejects the wallet signature request (edit dialog).

editApiKey.updateFailure.description: Toast shown when updating the API key fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

revokeApiKey.walletActionDescription.description: Phrase appended to a wallet-signature prompt describing the action, e.g. 'Sign … to revoke the API key'.

revokeApiKey.title.description: Title of the Revoke API Key confirmation dialog.

revokeApiKey.description.description: Confirmation-dialog body warning that revoking is permanent and will break apps using the key.

revokeApiKey.keyToRevoke.description: Label preceding the name/prefix of the key being revoked. Ends with a colon.

revokeApiKey.attestWithSignature.description: Checkbox label to optionally attest the revocation with a wallet signature.

revokeApiKey.optional.description: Inline '(optional)' marker shown next to a non-required field. Includes the parentheses.

revokeApiKey.signingWallet.description: Field label for selecting which wallet will sign the revocation.

revokeApiKey.active.description: Inline '(active)' marker next to the active wallet in the signing-wallet selector. Includes the parentheses.

revokeApiKey.noWalletsConnected.description: Message shown when no wallets are connected, prompting the user to connect one first (revoke dialog).

revokeApiKey.revoking.description: Button label shown while the API key is being revoked (in-progress state).

revokeApiKey.revokeKey.description: Confirm button to revoke the API key.

revokeApiKey.selectWalletError.description: Validation error shown when no signing wallet has been selected (revoke dialog).

revokeApiKey.revokeSuccess.description: Toast shown after the API key is revoked successfully.

revokeApiKey.signatureRejected.description: Toast shown when the user rejects the wallet signature request (revoke dialog).

revokeApiKey.revokeFailure.description: Toast shown when revoking the API key fails. {error} is a raw error message — keep untranslated.

loginHistory.title.description: Heading of the login-history section in the security area.

loginHistory.description.description: Subheading under Login History describing recent sign-ins and advising to contact support if anything looks unfamiliar. Keep the brand name 'Namefi' untranslated.

loginHistory.loadError.description: Error title shown when the login history fails to load.

loginHistory.loadErrorFallback.description: Error body inviting the user to retry loading the login history shortly.

loginHistory.retry.description: Button to retry loading the login history.

loginHistory.empty.description: Empty-state title shown when there are no recorded sign-ins yet.

loginHistory.emptyHelp.description: Empty-state helper text explaining new sessions appear after the next sign-in.

loginHistory.unknownLocation.description: Fallback text for a sign-in whose geographic location could not be determined.

loginHistory.unknownBrowser.description: Fallback text for a sign-in whose browser could not be determined.

loginHistory.onOs.description: Sign-in descriptor combining browser and OS, e.g. 'Chrome on macOS'. {browser} and {os} are detected names — keep untranslated.

loginHistory.newIp.description: Badge flagging a sign-in from a new IP address. Keep the technical term 'IP'.

loginHistory.newLocation.description: Badge flagging a sign-in from a new geographic location.

loginHistory.newBrowser.description: Badge flagging a sign-in from a new browser.

loginHistory.firstSignIn.description: Badge marking the user's first recorded sign-in.

loginHistory.method.description: Line showing the authentication method used for a sign-in. {method} is the method name (e.g. 'email', 'wallet') — keep untranslated.

loginHistory.signedInAt.description: Line showing when a session was started. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. '3 hours ago'.

loginHistory.lastAccessedAt.description: Line showing when a session was last active. {time} is a relative timestamp, e.g. '5 minutes ago'.

loginHistory.recognized.description: Status badge indicating the user marked this sign-in as recognized (theirs).

loginHistory.rejected.description: Status badge indicating the user marked this sign-in as not theirs.

loginHistory.undo.description: Button to undo a recognized/rejected decision on a sign-in.

loginHistory.thatWasMe.description: Button to mark a flagged sign-in as recognized (the user's own).

loginHistory.notMe.description: Button to mark a flagged sign-in as not the user's own (suspicious).

loginHistory.decisionUpdateFailure.description: Toast shown when saving the user's recognized/not-me decision fails.
